## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Security Impact

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security impact reviewed and documented in this PR
- [ ] Threat model updated (if auth/integration/data-flow changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed behavior
- [ ] Negative-path tests added/updated for auth/input/authorization where relevant
- [ ] Session/cookie controls verified (`HttpOnly`, `Secure`, `SameSite`, timeout/rotation) where relevant
- [ ] SQL/query paths use parameterization only
- [ ] No secrets committed; sensitive logging reviewed
- [ ] Data classification/retention impact reviewed
- [ ] CI quality and security checks pass

Add anything reviewers should pay attention to (risk, rollout, follow-up).
